hmong.good_speakers_use_pauses_aim_for_20_30: Cov neeg hais lus zoo siv kev so! Tsom rau 20-30% kev so hauv koj cov lus.

hmong.analyzes_pause_patterns_syllable_rate_: Txheeb xyuas cov qauv so, kev sib xws ntawm tus nqi lub suab, thiab kev ruaj khov ntawm suab nrov los tsim cov qhab nia kev hais ntxhee. Kaw tsawg kawg 10 vib nas this ntawm kev hais lus, ces nyem "Txheeb kev hais ntxhee."

hmong.visualizes_your_vowel_sounds_on_an_ipa: Ua duab koj cov suab niam ntawv rau ntawm IPA vowel quadrilateral siv formant analysis (F1/F2). Hais ib lub suab niam ntawv thiab saib lub dot txav mus qhia qhov koj lub suab niam ntawv poob. Trail mode qhia diphthong hloov!

hmong.green_circles_target_vowel_positions_o: Cov voj voog ntsuab = qhov chaw niam ntawv tsom. Dot txiv kab ntxwv = koj lub suab niam ntawv tam sim no. Kab xiav paj yeeb = cov niam ntawv hloov tsis ntev los no.
hmong.recordings_are_automatically_saved_whe: Cov kaw suab raug khaws cia tau txais thaum koj tsum lub microphone. Rov tso lawv nrog prosody annotation sib txuas. Peb qhov kaw kawg raug khaws.

hmong.live_visualizer_record_read_your_deliv: Cuab yeej ua duab ncaj qha — kaw thiab nyeem koj txoj kev hais
hmong.real_time_pitch_trace_volume_meter_fil: Pitch trace ncaj qha + volume meter + tus suav lo lus ntxiv. Cov neeg hais lus uas tau kev cob qhia hloov qib suab ~30% hauv ib kab lus; kev hais tiaj tiaj poob kev mloog tsom ntawm tus neeg mloog hauv ~20 vib nas this.
hmong.practice_work_through_a_delivery: Xyaum — ua ib txoj kev hais kom tiav
hmong.pacing_target_150_wpm_pauses_between_i: Qhov ceev tsom ~150 lo lus/feeb. Kev so ntawm cov tswv yim (1-2 vib nas this) muaj hnyav npaum li cov lus. Nyeem koj cov ntawv nrov nrov ua ntej; cov kab lus tsis ncaj ncees qhia lawv tus kheej tam sim ntawd.
hmong.multilingual_same_speech_multiple_lang: Ntau hom lus — tib zaj lus hais, ntau hom lus
hmong.speech_rate_varies_dramatically_by_lan: Tus nqi hais lus txawv heev raws hom lus: Spanish + Japanese ~7 lub suab/vib nas this; English ~6; Mandarin ~5. Tus nqi ntaub ntawv yuav luag zoo ib yam — cov lus uas nyob ze hais qeeb dua.
hmong.report_your_delivery_analytics: Ntawv qhia — kev txheeb xyuas koj txoj kev hais
hmong.pace_pitch_range_filler_word_density_p: Ceev, qib suab dav, lo lus ntxiv ntom, sijhawm so — txhua qho tau qhab nia piv nrog cov hom phiaj muaj kev tshawb fawb txhawb. Nyem txhua qhov ntsuas los saib ib qho lus hais + ib lub tswv yim cob qhia.
hmong.prosody_discover_how_delivery_shapes_m: Prosody — nrhiav pom kev hais ua lub ntsiab li cas
hmong.adjust_pitch_offset_pace_and_volume_ga: Kho pitch offset, ceev, thiab volume gain, ces sau tseg dab tsi koj pom. Tsis muaj qhab nia, tsis muaj qhia — tsim koj tus kheej kev xav vim li cas feem ntau TED talks nyob ze 150 lo lus/feeb.
hmong.suited_to_emphasis_reflection_gravitas: Haum rau kev tseem ceeb, kev xav, kev hnyav.
hmong.default_for_most_speaking_natural_rhyt: Qhov chaw rau feem ntau kev hais lus. Suab paj nruag ntuj.
hmong.conveys_excitement_urgency_energy: Xa kev zoo siab, kev ceev nrooj, zog.
hmong.too_fast_comprehension_drops: Ceev dhau — kev to taub poob.
hmong.adjust_pitch_offset_pacing_volume_disc: Kho pitch offset, ceev, suab nrov. Discrete 4-tempo classification. Tsis muaj qhab nia, tsis muaj qhia.
hmong.hypothesis_how_does_pace_affect_audien: Kev xav: Qhov ceev cuam tshuam li cas rau kev to taub ntawm cov neeg tuaj saib?
hmong.most_ted_talks_are_150_wpm_investigate: Feem ntau TED talks yog ~150 lo lus/feeb. Tshawb nrhiav vim li cas.
hmong.when_does_pitch_variation_help_vs_dist: Thaum twg qib suab hloov pab vs ua rau tsis mloog?
hmong.explain_how_prosody_shapes_oratory_imp: Piav qhia prosody ua li cas rau kev cuam tshuam ntawm kev hais lus.
hmong.design_note_discrete_4_tempo_marker_no: Kev tsim nyob rau: discrete 4-tempo cim; tsis muaj qhab nia kev hais; tsis muaj qhia — los ntawm kev tsim.
hmong.this_tool_is_designed_as_a_tier_1_clas: Cov cuab yeej no yog tsim los ua Tier 1 kev cuam tshuam hauv chav kawm. Rau kev kho kev hais lus ntawm tus kheej, thov sab laj nrog ib tus kws kho lus uas tau ntawv pov thawj.
hmong.visualizations_use_web_audio_api_pitch: Cov duab siv Web Audio API pitch detection (autocorrelation) thiab amplitude analysis. Txhua qhov kev ua tshwm sim hauv zos hauv lub browser — tsis muaj suab raug kaw los sis xa.
